Office of the Archbishop of York

Contact us

Use the contact form below to send a message to the office of the Archbishop. Alternatively, you can write to Office of the Archbishop of York, Bishopthorpe Palace, Bishopthorpe, York, YO23 2GE or call the switchboard during office hours (9am - 5pm) at 01904 707021. You may have a query which is answered on the FAQs.

We value the letters and emails we receive, but due to the sheer volume, we are unable to read or reply to all of them.

Safeguarding

If you have a safeguarding concern, please contact Sukhbir Singh on 01904 707021 or Rob Marshall on 07914 668907.

Media enquiries

For media queries only, call 07738 354491.

How to find us

Our postal address is:

The Most Reverend & Right Honourable Stephen Cottrell, Archbishop of York
The Office of the Archbishop of York
Bishopthorpe Palace
Bishopthorpe
York
YO23 2GE
 


To find us using what3words: ///dinner.dwell.author

Prayer for the Day

Sunday, 3 May 2026
The Fifth Sunday of Easter

Risen Christ,
your wounds declare your love for the world
and the wonder of your risen life:
give us compassion and courage
to risk ourselves for those we serve,
to the glory of God the Father.
Amen.

Get more prayer resources

Everyday Faith

Get the daily devotional app from the Church of England designed to inspire, equip and encourage you in your faith every day of the week.

Download the app

Safeguarding

The Church of England is committed to safeguarding as an integral part of its ministry and mission, promoting a safer culture and the welfare of every child, young person and adult.

Find safeguarding resources
